description.s: Shared modal library for consistent modal dialogs. Provides showModal(), confirm(), and alert() functions with standard behavior (backdrop, Escape key, click-outside-to-close).

showModal.name: showModal
showModal.description: Shows a modal dialog with the provided content.

params.name: options
params.description: .content - Content element or function that receives { close } and returns element

params.name: options
params.description: .title] - Optional title for the modal header

params.name: options
params.description: .showCloseButton=true] - Show X close button in header

params.name: options
params.description: .api] - Hobson API (uses document.createElement if not provided)

returns.type: { close: Function, overlay: HTMLElement, modalBox: HTMLElement

returns.description: - true if confirmed, false if cancelled
